tissue.prompt_description: Tissue is a group of cells that work together to perform a specific function in an organism. e.g., leaf, root, etc. (NOTE: When the term to be extracted is written in the plural, change it to the singular.)

cell_type.prompt_description: Cell type is a classification of cells based on their structure and function, representing normal cells. e.g., guard cell, pollen sperm cell, etc. (NOTE: When the term to be extracted is written in the plural, change it to the singular.)
